title: OpenAI says ChatGPT is not a lawyer, asks to dismiss case
description: OpenAI has asked a federal judge to dismiss a lawsuit alleging it gave unauthorised legal advice, arguing that its generative artificial intelligence platform ChatGPT is not a lawyer and does not practice law.
content:
OpenAI has asked a federal judge to dismiss a lawsuit alleging it gave unauthorised legal advice, arguing that its generative artificial intelligence platform ChatGPT is not a lawyer and does not practice law.

title: Booing Commencement Speakers Over AI Is Almost a Trend
description: Commencement speakers are facing boos and jeers from the Class of 2026 when they invoke artificial intelligence in their speeches.

title: Dell Adds 1,000 Clients for AI Servers, Targets Corporate Users
description: Dell Technologies Inc. said it added 1,000 customers for a key AI product line in the past quarter as the company tries to capture business from traditional large businesses taking on new artificial intelligence workloads.

title: Anthropic Stock Crackdown Jolts Buyers in Pre-IPO AI Startups
description: In the moments after Anthropic expanded a ban on popular ways to buy its shares, investor chatrooms around the world lit up. “Are we screwed?” one person wrote in a WhatsApp chat for family offices with several hundred members. title: Pope and co-founder of Anthropic to launch pontiff's AI encyclical on May 25
description: ROME — Pope Leo XIV and the co-founder of artificial intelligence company Anthropic will launch the pontiff’s first encyclical on May 25, a document on the care of human dignity in the era of AI, the Vatican said Monday.

title: Pope Leo XIV to unveil AI-focused encyclical with Anthropic co-founder on May 25
description: Pope Leo XIV will unveil ‘Magnifica Humanitas’, the Vatican’s first AI-focused encyclical, addressing artificial intelligence, warfare, workers’ rights and human dignity alongside Anthropic co-founder Christopher Olah.
content:
